description.value:
Frequency once per day

Your boundless enthusiasm is infectious, and you can share some of that energy and can-do attitude with your allies. You and all allies within 60 feet gain a +10-foot status bonus to Speed and the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] condition for 4 rounds. Creatures can use the extra action each round only to Stride.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Supersonic Speed] feat, you and each ally gain concealment until the start of their next turn if they Stride while quickened from Let's Go. As usual for concealment involving an obvious visual manifestation, you can't use this concealment to [[/act hide]].
